title: iberis soyeri subsp. prostii
intro: Iberis soyeri subsp. prostii, also known as Iberis prostii, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a plant native to the mountainous regions of Greece, where it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Iberis prostii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
